{{Quote|The thorn forest? That means we have to go through the glop pits.|Latara|<ref name="Night of the Stranger">{{Ewoks|Night of the Stranger}}</ref>}}
The '''glop pits''' was a large swamp on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]] in between [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] and the [[thorn forest]]. It was the home of the [[glok monster]]s and apparently gave off a foul odor. The [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] children [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]], [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]], [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]], and [[Latara/Legends|Latara]] once traveled through the glop pits and fought off a glop monster on their way to rescue the Ewok [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]], [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] from the [[Stranger]].

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|Night of the Stranger}} {{1st}}
